questions.explanation: 下列哪項物品不屬於外接裝置? 在非洲或是南美洲某些開發中的國家,家庭已經因 (A) 電腦滑鼠 (B) 麥克風 (C) 筆電 (D) 喇叭 為貧窮在苦苦掙扎,而且他們甚至無法負擔食物或基本 Question 36-38 用品,更別說是給女性家庭成員的生理期用品了。在肯 請閱讀以下這封 Riverside 高中圖書館長寫的關於圖 亞奈羅比的 16 歲女孩妮珊拉說她之前都是從學校取得衛 書館閉館的公開信。然後請根據訊息回答下列問題。 生棉,但是因為學校因為疫情不開放,使她得使用幾塊 親愛的學生及教職員工, 布來替代,這讓她感到很不舒服。她說「我感到很沮喪 10 月 31 日 因為我無法正常地做事,像做家事或是坐下,因為我總 由於臺灣疾病管制局已將新冠肺炎之警戒升至第 3 害怕會弄髒我的衣服。」 級,為了因應新冠肺炎的傳播,圖書館將閉館至 12 月 為了處理生理期貧困的問題,許多國際及非營利組 22 日。在閉館期間,讀者仍可以在線上預約書籍。在書 織開始採取行動。他們在窮困的社區行動,分發衛生及 籍預約完成後,請記得線上預約取書時間。一旦您完成 生理期用品箱給女性員工及年輕女性。這些箱子內含衛 取書預約,您將透過電子郵件收到取書碼。您可以帶著 生棉、肥皂、洗衣產品,都是年輕女孩及女人必需品, 取書碼在指定日期與時間於圖書館前方之臨時櫃檯取 如此她們才能過著安全且更有尊嚴的生活。 預約書。在抵達前,請記得攜帶您的圖書證及取書碼。

questions.subject: 英文

questions.q: Why is the Riverside High School library closed?
options: To lower the prevention of COVID-19.
To raise the COVID-19 alert restriction.
To avoid the spread of the pandemic.
To wear a mask and keep a social distance.
questions.explanation: 正解：(C)；來源：110-2-四技二專-00共同科目 英文解析.pdf

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 110-2-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: Based on the information above, what is the correct procedure for a student or a staff member to get the reserved books?
options: Arrive at the library counter  bring the reservation code  request books online
Get a pick-up code via email  request books online  bring the code and library card
Bring the library card and pick-up code  request books online  arrive at the library counter
Request books online  get a pick-up code via email  bring the code and library card
questions.explanation: 正解：(D)；來源：110-2-四技二專-00共同科目 英文解析.pdf

questions.q: Based on the announcement above, which of the following statements is INCORRECT during the library closure?
options: All the academic events are either cancelled or postponed.
Readers should wear masks when picking up the reserved books.
The original book return dates will be extended to December 22nd.

There is no late-return fines during the library closure. ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 39-41 題 More than 700 million people, or 10% of the world population live in extreme poverty today. Females and young girls are particular groups that need real help. For example, women and girls in certain areas cannot even afford their menstrual( 生理期的 ) products, such as sanitary pads or napkins. It’s hard to imagine that they have to use broken, old rags or straw rather than safe period products. This reality puts girls in developing countries at risk for infection, sickness and other health problems. In some developing countries in Africa or South America, families are struggling due to poverty, and they cannot even afford food or basic supplies, not to mention the period products for the female family members. Nisera, a 16-year-old young girl in Nairobi, Kenya, said that she used to get sanitary towels from her school, but since the schools were closed due to the pandemic, she had to use pieces of cloth, which made her very uncomfortable. She said, “I feel sad as I can’t do things normally, like household chores, nor can I sit down as I am afraid of soiling my clothes.”
questions.explanation: 正解：(A)；來源：110-2-四技二專-00共同科目 英文解析.pdf

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 110-2-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: What is the main idea of this article?
options: International non-profit organizations manage to fight diseases around the world.
Lack of nutrition makes women and young ladies at risk of infection and sickness.
Girls and women use the old rags or straw to replace the safe period products.
Females in certain areas are not able to gain access to menstrual products because of poverty.
questions.explanation: 正解：(D)；來源：110-2-四技二專-00共同科目 英文解析.pdf

options: From the non-profit organizations
From their family members
From their schools
From the hygiene kits

One out of ten people around the world is living in a very poor condition. 二、非選擇題 ( 第 I 到第 III 題,每題 6 分,共 18 分 ) I. 填充 說明: ▲請依據中文提示,將試題內空格  、  答案之完整單字 ( 含提示之字首 ),分別作答於答 案卷之作答欄  、  之指定範圍內以完成句子。 ▲請勿抄題,每格限填一字,超過一字者視為錯誤,不予計分。
